name: Rubrik
confidenceReason: Recently profitable data security platform with ~24% expected growth. However, extreme valuation (800x forward PE) means the CAGR model shows negative returns at current prices.
bullCase: Zero-trust data security is becoming non-negotiable. 48% YoY revenue growth and recently inflected to profitability and positive FCF.
bearCase: Newly public company with limited track record of sustained profitability; highly competitive data protection market.
